query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS external_businesses (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  user_id VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL,
  name VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL,
  type ENUM('vendor', 'partner', 'contractor', 'client', 'supplier', 'consultant', 'agency', 'other') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'vendor',
  industry VARCHAR(255),
  contact_name VARCHAR(255),
  contact_email VARCHAR(255),
  contact_phone VARCHAR(50),
  website VARCHAR(500),
  address TEXT,
  city VARCHAR(100),
  state VARCHAR(50),
  zip_code VARCHAR(20),
  country VARCHAR(100) DEFAULT 'USA',
  ein VARCHAR(20),
  duns_number VARCHAR(20),
  notes TEXT,
  status ENUM('active', 'inactive', 'pending', 'blacklisted') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'active',
  rating INT DEFAULT 0,
  total_contracts INT DEFAULT 0,
  total_spend DECIMAL(15,2) DEFAULT 0.00,
  created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  updated_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  INDEX idx_user_id (user_id),
  INDEX idx_type (type),
  INDEX idx_status (status),
  INDEX idx_name (name)
);
